_comment: Synthesis-Dark canonical color palette v2.0.0. Single source of truth for all theme colors.

indigo_gray.role: Synthesis primary accent; folder color; UI emphasis

selection.role: Selection highlight (indigo-mauve-purple centroid). Replaces Dracula pink #ff79c6 in gtk-3.0 and harmonizes with #bd93f9 across all GTK versions. Computed as HSL centroid of #bd93f9 + #cba6f7 + #b4befe: H=255 S=0.90 L=0.81.

purple.role: Dracula purple (legacy; kept for compatibility in SCSS variables). Prefer selection for selection bg.

teal_primary.role: CachyOS teal; WM button background; success indicator (COLOR-STRATEGY target)

cyan_standard.role: Standard Dracula cyan; gtk-3.20 and gtk-4.0 link color

cyan_adjusted.role: Adjusted cyan used in gnome-shell and cinnamon. Slightly darker/more saturated than standard. Intentional variant for dark panel contrast.
cyan_adjusted.rationale: Used in GNOME Shell and Cinnamon where full-brightness #8be9fd washes out on dark panels. Kept as named variant rather than replaced.

red_catppuccin.role: Catppuccin red; COLOR-STRATEGY transform target for red family

green_dracula.role: Dracula green (base palette). Kept as SCSS variable. Not the transform target.
green_dracula.note: COLORSCHEME.md references this as the base; COLOR-STRATEGY.md targets #17b169 after transform. Both are correct for their respective purposes.

pink.role: Dracula pink. Previously used as selection color in gtk-3.0. Replaced by #b9a4fa (selection) per P3.2.

wm_button_bg.note: CachyOS teal used for WM buttons in metacity-theme-3.xml. Intentional high-contrast accent.
